hero.eyebrow: Computer Engineer · Backend / Full Stack Developer
hero.title: I build solid, scalable, results-driven digital solutions.
hero.description: Specialized in Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, databases, and web development. My approach combines clean architecture, maintainable code, and clear communication to turn ideas into useful products.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Professional Profile
about.description: I am a developer focused on creating reliable backend applications, clean integrations, and functional web experiences. I enjoy solving real-world problems with best practices, clear documentation, and appropriate technology for each case.
about.contribution1: Backend development with Java and Spring Boot.
about.contribution2: Design and implementation of REST APIs.
about.contribution4: Responsive web applications with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
about.contribution5: Version control with Git and collaborative work.
about.objectiveDesc: Continue growing as a software developer, participate in challenging projects, and contribute solutions that improve processes, products, and user experience.

experience.title: Career Path
experience.subtitle: Learning Journey

experience.webDesc: Semantic HTML, modern CSS, JavaScript, and responsive user experience.
experience.nextStepsDesc: Deepen knowledge in testing, security, cloud, Docker, and scalable architectures.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Next Project
contact.description: If you're looking for someone to support with backend, APIs, application maintenance, or web development, you can write me and coordinate a conversation.
